Carapace

Local control plane

Auth

Use gateway token/password to call Control API and open pairing WebSocket.

No credential loaded.

Channels

Raw JSON 
{}

Config Snapshot (Redacted)

Read-only redacted config + hash for optimistic concurrency.

{}

Config Update

Apply one path update through POST /control/config.

Device Pairing (WebSocket)

Uses client ID carapace-control-ui over /ws.

Pairing socket disconnected.

Paired Devices

Pairing event log 
[]

Security Notice

This page is not on HTTPS and not localhost. Some auth/pairing paths may be blocked unless gateway.controlUi.allowInsecureAuth=true.
